summary: The statements comparing efficacy between midazolam and diazepam suggest similar receptor binding affinity but highlight distinct advantages like higher potency and improved memory suppression; however, no definitive proof supports a unique advantage purely based on reduced thrombophlebitis likelihood attributed solely due to differing water solubilities without additional supportive data linking these properties exclusively. Hence, option B remains exceptional as there lacks robust substantiation isolating its benefit compared other aspects discussed making it less likely accurate among provided choices reflecting actual
